default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Superhuman and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, team updates, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Morgan Maurer joined Superhuman team to assist with content and alleviate Alex's workload](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [GrowthX prepared 200+ AI email management keywords; team to focus on AI-first strategy with some email management topics](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Alex to review articles for tone/voice alignment; Ghost CMS to be used for blog content](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Team plans to scale up content production in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Updates

  - [Morgan Maurer introduced as new Superhuman team member](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [Based in Seattle; will assist with content and take on some of Alex's responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Alex to remain involved in early stages, focusing on tone, voice, and messaging](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)

### Content Strategy and Keywords

  - [Elvis prepared 200+ keywords related to AI email management](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Team agreed to include some email management topics (e.g., strategies, software)](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Harmony cautioned against muddying waters with unrelated topics (e.g., HubSpot, marketing, CS)](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Decision to focus on AI-first strategy, with email management as low-hanging fruit](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [Discussed potential value in analyzing intranet companies' SEO/content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Decided against comparing to project/task management apps (e.g., Asana, Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Shortwave identified as relevant competitor for team collaboration comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)

### CMS and Platform Discussion

  - [Plan to schedule a Ghost CMS tour for GrowthX team next week](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Confirmed continued use of Ghost for blog content](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Future plan to move from subdomain to main domain while still using Ghost](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Framer used for main CMS but not suitable for blog content](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

### Content Review and Scaling

  - [Alex to review articles for tone and voice alignment](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Elvis to send a second article for review](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Team aims to scale up content production next week and further in the following week](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Alex to review the first article and provide feedback on tone/voice](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Elvis to send second article for review](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Schedule Ghost CMS tour (GrowthX to coordinate with Superhuman team via Slack)](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [GrowthX to update Airtable with new keywords and topics](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Team to begin scaling up content production next week](https://fathom.video/share/E2LVJo8t1kae8XivDwUziFX-JLkgr-am?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)

action_items.description: Watch recordings of last 2 meetings to get up to speed on project
Send new article to Alex for review. Focus on Superhuman features, tone, style, product discussion
Update Airtable with 200+ keywords related to AI email management
